hero.monoSub: Premium digital agency — design, AI & strategic growth.

services.title: Services That Drive Growth
services.desc: From stunning websites to AI-powered automation and high-impact marketing, we deliver digital solutions that transform your business.

s1.title: Never Miss a Customer
s1.desc: While you sleep, it books. While you're in meetings, it answers. An AI that works your front desk — 24/7, zero salary.

s2.title: Digital Presence
s2.desc: From first impression to lasting performance. Everything your brand needs to exist, convert, and grow online.

s3.title: Growth Engine
s3.desc: Paid and organic working together. We build campaigns that attract the right people and turn them into customers.

s4.title: Brand System
s4.desc: A brand that people remember. We craft the visual identity and voice that makes you stand out in any market.

s5.title: Social & Content
s5.desc: Consistent, strategic content that builds an audience and keeps your brand relevant across every platform.

s6.title: Always On
s6.desc: We don't disappear after launch. Ongoing maintenance, monitoring, and support — so your digital assets never let you down.

aiSection.title: Meet Your AI Receptionist
aiSection.desc: Never miss a customer again. Our AI receptionist handles inquiries, books appointments, and provides instant responses — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
aiSection.chat1: Hi! Welcome to your business. How can I help you today?
aiSection.chat2: I'd like to book an appointment for tomorrow.
aiSection.chat3: Of course! I have availability at 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM. Which works better for you?
aiSection.chat5: You're all set for tomorrow at 2:00 PM. I'll send a confirmation to your email.

whyUs.title: Why Choose OSVENA?
whyUs.desc: We don't just build websites. We build growth engines.

about.title: Building Digital Success Stories
about.p1: OSVENA is a forward-thinking digital agency with years of experience helping businesses grow their online presence. We combine cutting-edge technology, creative design, and data-driven marketing to deliver results that matter.
about.p2: From local startups to established brands, we've helped dozens of businesses transform their digital footprint. Our approach is simple: understand your vision, craft the perfect solution, and deliver excellence.

process.title: How We Work
process.desc: A streamlined process designed to bring your vision to life — efficiently and beautifully.
process.s1d: We learn about your business, goals, and vision to build the perfect strategy.
process.s2d: We craft stunning visuals and user experiences tailored to your brand.
process.s3d: We bring designs to life with clean, performant, and scalable code.
process.s4d: We launch your project and provide ongoing support to ensure success.

contact.title: Ready to Grow Your Business?
contact.desc: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a free consultation.
contact.successMsg: We've received your message and will contact you shortly.
contact.errorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
